name: Air Space Shooter
description: Defend the galaxy in epic air battles! Blast enemies, upgrade ships, and conquer the universe. Prepare for intense space combat in Galactic Air Strike: Space Shooter! Join the fight to defend the galaxy from ruthless alien invaders in this action-packed arcade game. Take control of powerful spaceships, upgrade your weapons, and unleash devastating attacks in dynamic air battles.
instructions: Tap and Drag to move and shoot
tags: 1 Player, Action, Aircraft, airplane, Flight, NapTech Games, Online, Shooter
